title: helichrysum angustifolium subsp. serotinum
intro: Helichrysum angustifolium subsp. serotinum, also known as the early yellow everlasting, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and promoting skin health. The health benefits of Helichrysum angustifolium subsp. serotinum include its ability to aid in the reduction of pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
